meaning: n.费用,旅客,食物vi.遭遇,进展,进步,经营,过活
examples: He could barely afford the fare.
The taxi driver picked up a fare at the station.
Barack Obama didn't fare as well, trailing McCain by nine points among the rural voters surveyed.
The basic fare across public transport is 50p, but the Istanbulkart smart card gives discounts.
